ci_regenerate_main_check.production_description: Freshly started Kimi Code with a Kimi version of the cameronfreer/lean4-skills plugin. Model K2.7, default settings. Command: `/lean4:prove Submission.lean` . Then only giving permissions that were asked for. No input during proof process. The question of golfing was answered positively. Uses small part of a $20/month subscription.

cubic_decay_asymptotic.production_description: Freshly started Kimi Code with a Kimi version of the cameronfreer/lean4-skills plugin. Model K2.7, default settings. Command: /lean4:prove Submission.lean . Then only giving permissions that were asked for. When the context reached 60% of the window the commands "Prepare for compaction", "/compact", "continue" were given. Used one hour of a $20/month subscription.
